config.title: Bank #ifdef _DEBUG [THIS_FILE] #endif
config.script:
'std_choice_list_hli #include "50200" 'section_fclose #include "50222"
'create_address #include "50111"
function fopen:fopen = std_fopen() section_fopen THIS_FILE end function
function fsave dim bSave: bSave=std_fsave()
if not bSave then section_fsave THIS_FILE end if end function
function fclose section_fclose THIS_FILE end function
#ifdef APPCONFIG_ADDRESSES_BY_ZIP QXR_GET_ADDRESSES_BY_ZIP() #endif

page.body:
XFBEGIN
XFPSEUDOSECBEG(30,NAPIS_BANK,2) QXX_NAZWA_SKROT
XFREQEDITFIELD(Nazwa oddziału,40,strOddzial) XFREQEDITFIELD(Kod rachunku,40,strKodRach) XFSECEND QXX_ADRES(7,,Adres) #ifdef _ALMA_TREND QXS_BEGIN_REQ(14,NAPIS_ATF,2) XFTEL1 XFTEL2 XFOPTEDITFIELD(SWIFT,20,strTel3) XFFAX XFOPTEMAIL(E-mail,strEmail) XFOPTWWW(WWW,strWWW) XFSECEND #else #ifdef _METROX QXS_BEGIN_REQ(14,NAPIS_ATF,2) XFTEL1 XFTEL2 XFOPTEDITFIELD(BIC,20,strTel3) XFFAX XFOPTEMAIL(E-mail,strEmail) XFOPTWWW(WWW,strWWW) XFSECEND #else #ifdef _TANDEM_BAITS QXS_BEGIN_REQ(14,NAPIS_ATF,2) XFTEL1 XFTEL2 XFOPTEDITFIELD(SWIFT,20,strTel3) XFFAX XFOPTEMAIL(E-mail,strEmail) XFOPTWWW(WWW,strWWW) XFSECEND #else XFBLOCK_EMAILTEL(14) #endif #endif #endif
XFEND
